steps.title: Identify what y means
steps.content: The variable $y$ represents the total amount of shellfish, in pounds, eaten during the full $6$ days. It is not the number of days or the amount per day.

steps.title: Use the stated total
steps.content: The problem states that the sea otter ate $27.0$ pounds of shellfish in those $6$ days, so $$ y=27 $$ The answer is B.
